name_en: P🔥 🆕 New Arrival 👏【Exclusive Background】New Large Elephant Print NIKai Front Flap Bag, accented with metal LE CASSANDRE, featuring convertible leather and chain shoulder strap. The popular NIKI Elephant Print is a favorite among many stars and influencers, often sold out at department stores. The globally popular NIKI features a large capacity and elephant print calfskin! The craftsmanship is very complex, offering you a unique visual effect! An absolute must-have style! 👑
